p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests from repo CI/CD: (1) eslint via node ./scripts/tasks/eslint.js - full repo lint, passes in ~60s; (2) flow dom-node via yarn flow dom-node - typechecks packages including react-devtools-core, passes in ~30s; (3) node --check on preload.js - syntax check for plain JS file. Excluded: prettier-check (OOM), full test suite (too slow/requires build), test-build-devtools (requires pre-built artifacts). Modified files: packages/react-devtools-core/src/backend.js, packages/react-devtools-core/src/standalone.js, packages/react-devtools/app.html, packages/react-devtools/preload.js

validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh to properly apply all changes. The original patch format had issues with file line numbers. Replaced with a Python-based file modification approach that correctly updates backend.js, standalone.js, app.html, and preload.js with the client options proxy feature. All 9 tests now pass (5 fail-to-pass, 4 pass-to-pass).
